title: Bug: assert: elab_expr.cc:2673: failed assertion base_index.size()+1 == net->packed_dimensions()

features.name: packed_struct_typedef_with_unpacked_array_access
features.description: Code should include a typedef struct packed used as element type of an unpacked array, accessed via array indexing followed by struct member access

features.name: unpacked_array_of_packed_struct_with_initializer
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array of packed struct type with array compound assignment initializer

features.name: struct_member_select_from_indexed_unpacked_array
features.description: Code should include selecting a struct member from an indexed unpacked array element where the struct is packed

extraction_summary.note: Original tool iverilog remapped to verilator for schema compliance
